item.description:
## What's Changed * Add app screenshot to README by @amalshaji in https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/pull/29 * Document Screen Aware in README by @amalshaji in https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/pull/30 * Fix crash when input device changes by @amalshaji in https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/pull/31 * Publish canary builds from main by @amalshaji in https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/pull/32 * Prepare 0.6.0 release by @amalshaji in https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/pull/34
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/compare/v0.5.0...v0.6.0

item.title: 0.6.0-canary.68
item.description:
## What's Changed * Prepare 0.6.0 release by @amalshaji in https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/pull/34
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/compare/canary-0.5.0-b66-aaeee2e2...canary-0.6.0-b68-e443362d

## What's Changed * Add early-development warning to README by @amalshaji in https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/pull/24 * Fix provider configuration status by @amalshaji in https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/pull/25 * Add screen-aware dictation by @amalshaji in https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/pull/26 * Restore floating status pill setting by @amalshaji in https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/pull/27 * Prepare 0.5.0 release by @amalshaji in https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/pull/28
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/compare/v0.4.1...v0.5.0

## What's Changed * Fix Fn press crashes by @amalshaji in https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/pull/22
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/amalshaji/dictator/compare/v0.4.0...v0.4.1
